title: IMEI Laundering
html: Stub. Stolen phones get their IMEI blacklisted from cellular networks — but thieves swap in valid IMEIs harvested from malware to revive them. Creates a black-market demand for live consumer IMEIs. Defensive proposal: a separate, app-facing globally-unique device ID. First mentioned in 2025 06 01 mobile malware survey felt.

related.label: Mobile malware survey — credential theft, premium SMS, 2FA bypass, IMEI defenses
Mobile malware survey (Felt et al.) — methodology, data set, novelty/amusement, selling user info
